assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'AddDeveloperSigningCredential() — this must be removed' and shows it commented as 'Old (remove this)'.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions Duende's automatic key management as the recommended replacement
assertions.rationale: States 'Duende IdentityServer (Business and Enterprise editions) includes automatic key management as a built-in feature. This is the recommended replacement.'

assertions.assertion: Response addresses the concern about existing tokens by suggesting a transitional period where the old key remains available for validation
assertions.rationale: Option 2 explicitly describes keeping the old key 'alongside automatic key management during a transitional period' with code showing AddValidationKey.

assertions.assertion: Response suggests that if all clients and APIs can be restarted, they will pick up the new key from the discovery document automatically
assertions.rationale: Option 1 states: 'If all clients and APIs can be restarted, they will pick up the new key from the discovery document automatically.'
